title: TAG HISTORIAN
body: Create a History Provider pointing to your database. This is where tag history gets stored — the backbone of trend charts.
code:
Create History Provider:
  Name:         default_history
  Database:     main_db (from step 8)
  Partitioning: 1 Month
  Pruning:      None (keep all data)

Tags with historyEnabled=true log here.

Storage modes:
  min/max/avg per scan class sample rate
  or raw values at scan rate
key: Must point to a database connection
mistakes: Forgetting to create a provider before enabling history
